race.comment: Open race. ARCHIE MAXIMUS (2) took charge a fair way from home then went on to record a dominant maiden victory over 1180m at Grafton last time out. Up sharply in trip off a six-week let-up which is concerning, but he is progressing well and is in good hands. Stablemate AUTUMN MISS (4) returned to form last start when runner-up over 1650m at Beaudesert. Back a little in grade today and should be in the finish again. HIGHWIRE GIRL (7) led for home but found one better over 1600m at Coffs Harbour recently. Cherry ripe after three runs back and should give a great sight up in the leading division. THE COMANCHE (10) can improve at the third run back from a spell. Has raced here at this trip once for a win. Veteran YORIKIRI (8) ran his best race for a while when just outside the placings at Taree last start. Saves his best for heavy going so don't rule him out.
